# 🚀  It's Tomorrow! Get Free Live Google Analytics 4 Training

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-07-15 13:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 934

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Still trying to figure out how to grow your website with Google
Analytics 4?

All the insights you need to boost traffic and sales are right
there in your analytics, but finding them can be tricky.

Tomorrow, we’ll show you exactly how to uncover them in just 30
minutes. You won't want to miss this!

Click the link below to sign up for the workshop.

👉 Google Analytics 4 Masterclass: Discover What's Working in 30
Minutes! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..7UWRxGDIgoiIfSLaJMjw5XjycIAQ_8kRIwX5eVvIM40 )


🗓️ Goes live TOMORROW at 10:30 AM EST

Here's a quick look at what you'll learn from our expert guide,
Zach Kwarta from MonsterInsights:

- How to Use Data for Growth: See what's working on your site so
you can get more traffic, subscribers, and sales.

- Analytics Made Easy: Find out how to get simple reports right
inside WordPress (no code needed!).

- Find the Best Reports: Learn which reports to look at so you
can make smart decisions quickly.

- Get Pro Tips: Receive special analytics tips from an expert to
help you get ahead.

If you're ready to finally understand your website analytics and
use them to grow your business, this is your chance.

Click here to save your FREE spot before it's too late! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..7UWRxGDIgoiIfSLaJMjw5XjycIAQ_8kRIwX5eVvIM40 )
 ⏰

See you tomorrow,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
